essence: Installs, inspects, and maintains fire extinguishers to ensure buildings remain compliant and protected.

identity.title: Fire Extinguisher Technician
identity.summary: Services, tests, and replaces fire extinguishers, ensuring they meet safety standards and function correctly in an emergency.

salary.notes: Technicians covering large commercial sites or multi‑site contracts can exceed £40k-£45k+.

qualifications: Training in fire‑extinguisher servicing (e.g., BAFE or equivalent)
Knowledge of extinguisher types, ratings, and regulations
Ability to test, refill, and certify extinguishers
Understanding of fire‑safety compliance and building requirements

lifestyle.description: Fire extinguisher technicians travel between homes, businesses, and public buildings inspecting, servicing, and replacing extinguishers. The role involves testing, refilling, ensuring compliance, and advising clients on correct placement and usage. It suits individuals who enjoy practical work, independence, and contributing to building safety.

habits: Follows strict servicing and certification procedures
Advises clients on correct extinguisher placement
